steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is more writers from Guinea. The phrase including Diallo is extra information, so the verb must agree with the plural noun writers.

steps.title: Remove singular verbs
steps.content:
• Choice A uses singular is, so it does not agree with writers.
  • Choice B uses singular has, so it does not agree with writers.
  • Choice D uses singular begins, so it does not agree with writers.

steps.title: Use the plural perfect verb
steps.content: The remaining choice uses have begun, the plural present perfect form that agrees with writers and fits the time phrase in recent years. The answer is C.
